title: podman start: remove containers configured for auto removal
body:
Make sure that containers configured for auto removal
(e.g., via `podman create --rm`) are removed in `podman start`
if starting the container failed.

Fixes: #10935
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

-->

Yes, the remote client missed the error code which this test was exercising.  Should be good now; at least worked locally.
